## Security Findings

### H-1: Reentrancy in Vault.withdraw

The withdraw function does not follow checks-effects-interactions.

### H-2: Flash Loan Attack on PriceOracle.getPrice

Oracle can be manipulated with flash loans.

### M-1: Missing Input Validation in Bridge.deposit

No zero-address check on recipient parameter.

### L-1: Floating Pragma in All Contracts

Solidity version not pinned.
